info.description: A statement block: heading + paragraphs, shown either as a slideshow card ('panel') or a two-column band ('band').

paragraphs.description: Body paragraphs. Separate paragraphs with a blank line.

backgroundSlides.description: Images that crossfade behind the panel (panel style). One per row.

variant.description: Layout: 'panel' = rounded slideshow statement card; 'band' = two-column band.

graphic.description: Band style only: which animated graphic to show.

graphicCaption.description: Caption shown under the band graphic (optional).

anchor.description: Anchor id for in-page links, e.g. investment_strategy (optional).
